tests.name: Monobit Frequency
tests.checks: Checks if the number of 0s and 1s is equal. (Ideal P>=0.01)

tests.name: Block Frequency
tests.checks: Checks if the density of 1s is consistent across local blocks.

tests.name: Runs Test
tests.checks: Checks for streaks of consecutive bits (e.g., 000 or 111).

tests.name: Chi-Square (Bytes)
tests.checks: Verifies that all 256 byte values (0-255) appear with equal frequency.

tests.name: Shannon Entropy
tests.checks: Measures information density per byte (Ideal is 8.0).

tests.name: Monte Carlo Pi
tests.checks: Estimates pi using random coordinate pairs (Error ~0.0%).

tests.name: Compression Ratio
tests.checks: Attempts to compress the data; failure to compress proves high entropy.
